title: Thinpak for 30 on Right Stuf
wikitext:
[]: Thinpak for $30 on Right Stuf             Quote Post by JB2448 » Mon Nov 28, 2011 12:12 am The Neon Genesis Evangelion Platinum Thinpak is on sale for $30 on Right Stuf . This is an awesome deal for all 26 episodes plus 21'-24'.

[]:             Quote Post by Kazorajia » Mon Nov 28, 2011 1:17 am This is a damn good deal! I already own it, but I'll get it for a friend who doesn't.
